title: Remove myceli apps moved to dedicated repo
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Myceli leaves the nest
gist.blurb: The Myceli apps have grown up and moved to their own dedicated repository. Keeping the main hive tidy!
gist.summary: Moved Myceli-related applications (website, docs, pitch) to a separate repository to streamline the core codebase.
gist.impact: Reduces repository noise and separates the Myceli project lifecycle from the main platform.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee is tidying up the garden, packing specific mushroom-shaped items (representing Myceli) into a nice moving box labeled with a mushroom icon. The scene is cozy and organized.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the bee mascot packing mushroom-shaped items into a wooden crate in a garden shed. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel background. Warm lighting, organized vibes. 8-bit aesthetic.
